title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Medanta

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Medanta
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
